title: maesobotrya floribunda var. sparsiflora
intro: Maesobotrya floribunda var. sparsiflora, also known as the African bush mango or wild mango, is a plant species within the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Maesobotrya floribunda var. sparsiflora include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues.
